name: Court & Litigation Deadline Pack
shortDescription: Court and litigation deadline control pack for court communication history, document logs, owner assignment, and filing/service review gates.
longDescription: Court & Litigation Deadline Pack extends Legal Office App with starter workflows for court matter intake, court document registration, deadline control, responsible owner assignment, court communication history, filing/service review gates, deadline followup, and matter closing. Deadline records require human validation and assigned owners before use.
